videoScreenshot.title: Video Screenshot
videoScreenshot.subtitle: Extract high-quality images from videos as episode thumbnails
videoScreenshot.uploadVideoFile: Please upload a video file (MP4, WebM, AVI, etc.)
videoScreenshot.waitForModelLoad: Please wait for the model to load before trying again
videoScreenshot.refreshPage: Please refresh the page and try again
videoScreenshot.uploadHint: Upload video files to extract screenshots, supports MP4, WebM, AVI, MOV and other common video formats

helpDialog.title: Usage Help
helpDialog.step1: Upload video files (supports MP4, WebM, AVI formats)
helpDialog.step3: Wait for model to load (indicator turns green)
helpDialog.step4: System will automatically start processing videos
helpDialog.step5: After processing, you can view and download screenshots
helpDialog.feature1: Support batch processing of multiple videos
helpDialog.feature2: Adjustable subtitle and character detection sensitivity
helpDialog.feature4: Sort screenshots by quality or time
helpDialog.note: This tool runs completely in the browser and will not upload your video files to any server. Processing large video files may take longer, please be patient.

videoCard.clickToSetMain: Click candidate frames to set as main
videoCard.noSuitableFrames: Could not find suitable video frames, please adjust settings and try again
videoCard.videoProcessingError: An error occurred during video processing, please try again
videoCard.downloadCompleteDesc: All screenshots have been packaged and downloaded
videoCard.videoRemovedDesc: Video has been removed from the list
videoCard.listClearedDesc: All videos have been removed from the list

hardSubtitle.title: Hard Subtitle Extraction
hardSubtitle.subtitle: Extract hard subtitles from video through VAD detection and OCR recognition
hardSubtitle.supportedFormats: Supports MP4, MKV, AVI and other formats
hardSubtitle.clickAndDragToSelect: Click and drag on the video preview to select subtitle regions
hardSubtitle.notConfiguredOcrModel: OCR model not configured. Please go to model service settings
hardSubtitle.dragSubtitleRegion: Drag on the video to select subtitle regions
hardSubtitle.startExtractingHint: Recognized subtitles will be displayed here after extraction starts

imageCropper.title: Image Cropper
imageCropper.subtitle: Smart cropping to fit different aspect ratios and purposes
imageCropper.dragAndDropImage: Drag and drop image here, or click to upload
imageCropper.supportedFormats: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP and other formats
imageCropper.uploadImageFile: Please upload an image file (JPG, PNG, WebP, etc.)
imageCropper.autoCrop: Auto crop to target aspect ratio
imageCropper.autoCropDescription: Automatically crop and resize images according to the currently selected aspect ratio ({{ratio}}) when uploading
imageCropper.dragDropHint: Drag and drop image here or click to upload
imageCropper.nonStandardStrategyDesc: Non-standard aspect ratio image cropping strategy, affects both poster ratios
imageCropper.batchNamingHint: When batch processing, rename output files according to this rule
imageCropper.tmdbFormatOnlyJpg: TMDB only supports JPG format images, both posters and backdrops
imageCropper.autoProcessHint: Auto process enabled, images will be processed automatically after upload
imageCropper.settingsSavedDesc: Your settings have been saved successfully
imageCropper.settingsSaveFailedDesc: Failed to save settings, please try again
imageCropper.usageGuide: Poster and Backdrop Cropper Usage Guide
imageCropper.help2to3Standard: 2:3 Standard Poster - Complies with TMDB poster specification, resolution range 500×750 to 2000×3000
imageCropper.help3to4Vertical: 3:4 Vertical Poster - Suitable for vertical display, resolution range 500×666 to 2000×2666
imageCropper.helpBackdropDesc: Suitable for episode covers, resolution range 1280×720 to 3840×2160
imageCropper.helpAutoProcessDesc: As long as auto process is enabled, any uploaded image will be automatically cropped and resized according to the currently selected mode
imageCropper.helpPosterComparisonDesc: In poster mode, the system will automatically generate cropped results for both 2:3 and 3:4 ratios. You can:
imageCropper.helpCompareVisually: Visually compare the cropping effects of both ratios
imageCropper.helpClickToSelect: Click "Select" button to switch the ratio to download
imageCropper.helpSelectedState: The selected ratio will show "Selected" status
imageCropper.helpResolutionLimitDesc: The system will automatically adjust output resolution to the specified range based on different modes:
imageCropper.helpAboveMax: Above maximum resolution: proportionally shrink to maximum resolution
imageCropper.helpBelowMin: Below minimum resolution: proportionally enlarge to minimum resolution
imageCropper.helpWithinRange: Within resolution range: keep original resolution
imageCropper.helpFormatRequirementDesc: All modes are forced to output JPG format (TMDB requirement)
imageCropper.helpStep1: Drag and drop image to upload area or click "Select Files" button to upload image
imageCropper.helpStep2: System will automatically process image and generate preview
imageCropper.helpStep3: In poster mode, view and compare the effects of both ratios
imageCropper.helpStep4: Click "Select" button to select the ratio to download
imageCropper.helpStep5: Click "Download Selected Image" button to save the processed image
imageCropper.helpStep6: Click "Clear" button to clear current processing result
imageCropper.helpStep7: Click "Reset" button to clear the workspace
imageCropper.downloadNotSupported: Current environment does not support file download
imageCropper.processErrorDesc: An error occurred during image processing
imageCropper.downloadFailDesc: An error occurred during image download

imageRecognition.title: Media Recognition
imageRecognition.uploadHint: Supports posters, stills, movie screenshots and other types
imageRecognition.advancedSearchModeDesc: Search similar images first to improve recognition accuracy
imageRecognition.uploadImageFirst: Please upload an image and start recognition first
imageRecognition.tryDifferentImage: Try using a different image or adjust search settings
imageRecognition.fileTypeErrorDesc: Please upload an image file (JPG, PNG, WebP, etc.)
imageRecognition.uploadImageFirst2: Need to upload an image to start analysis
imageRecognition.waitSeconds: To avoid API limits, please wait {{seconds}} seconds before trying again
imageRecognition.waitForCurrentAnalysis: Please wait for current analysis to complete
imageRecognition.apiRateLimit: API request too frequent, please wait a few minutes and try again.
imageRecognition.imageAnalysisFailed: Image analysis failed, unable to get analysis results
imageRecognition.searchFailed: Search failed, unable to get matching results
